raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirmative self-declaration of intentions to reduce self-imposed effort and justification",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "ease, rest, clarity, and flow are inherently allowable without prior justification or earning",
    "effort is frequently generated by habit rather than necessity",
    "simplicity is often already present and can be accepted",
    "resistance to life can be voluntarily released",
    "these shifts represent beneficial or preferable states"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent; all lines converge on the single theme of relinquishing unnecessary striving and self-justification",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the recipient experiences habitual over-effort, perfectionism, or resistance that impairs well-being or effectiveness, and the statements are treated as optional personal reminders rather than universal rules",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statements are interpreted as license to avoid necessary effort, responsibility, or engagement with difficult realities"
}
